perTest.description: Kickoff: full kickoff arc has welcome + roadmap + account_status question, no premature credential asks, no leaked internal labels
Monorepo: stops to ask which package to integrate using the app_location form, does not silently pick one
Skips Step 3 (SDK install) when SDK is already installed and initialized, hands off to first flag
Resume from live state: re-surveys silently, lands on Step 4 (first flag), does not restart kickoff
First flag (Step 4): creates kebab-case boolean flag, gates toggle behind off_state_confirmed ask-question, no premature targeting
Narrative quality: full-mode arc narrates plan upfront, states progress along the way, names value at completion, and signals done
